name: Blackberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cake mix, gelatin, oil and milk; beat until blended.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Fold in the blackberries, coconut and pecans. Pour into three greased 9-inch round baking pans.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until cake tests done with a toothpick; cool in pans for 10 minutes before removing to wire racks.
Icing:
1. Cream butter in a mixing bowl. Add sugar and milk; beat until desired consistency is reached.
2. Stir in blackberries, coconut and pecans. Frost the top of each layer; stack on serving plate with a plain layer on top. Frost the top and sides of the cake.
